summary: The notebook has two published notes: a course note on gradient descent basics and a structured reading note on the Transformer architecture.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One course note covers gradient-descent fundamentals, the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: The ml-foundations course has only a single note; broad topics like linear models, regularization, and evaluation are not yet present.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A reading note on 'Attention Is All You Need' explains self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and the encoder-decoder stack.
areas.gap: No notes yet on other architectures, training dynamics, or downstream adaptations beyond this single Transformer reading.
